conditions.name: Anhedonia
conditions.effectSummary: Recovery feels numb and incomplete. Sanity-based focus and morale suffer.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level deepens the emotional flatline and worsens penalties.
conditions.treatment: Rest, therapy, meds, squad support, secure downtime.
conditions.description: The operative struggles to feel relief, reward, or emotional connection after stress.

conditions.name: Bleeding
conditions.effectSummary: Ongoing blood loss. Existing bleed automation handles the Health drain.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level increases blood loss and compounds danger.
conditions.treatment: Pressure, clotting agent, dressing, tourniquet, surgery.
conditions.description: Open trauma or internal bleeding is actively worsening the operative's condition.

conditions.name: Broken
conditions.effectSummary: Confidence and composure collapse under pressure.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level makes leadership and fear control harder.
conditions.treatment: Reassurance, therapy, recovery, successful action, removal from stressors.
conditions.description: The operative has emotionally cracked and struggles to hold formation or nerve.

conditions.name: Corrosive Atmosphere
conditions.effectSummary: Acidic or corrosive exposure slows movement and punishes endurance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens pain, degradation, and mobility loss.
conditions.treatment: Seal suit, neutralise contaminant, wash down, replace compromised gear.
conditions.description: The operative is operating in or contaminated by a corrosive environment.

conditions.name: Coward
conditions.effectSummary: The operative hesitates when violence and fear collide.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level further erodes combat nerve and fear control.
conditions.treatment: Calming support, therapy, command pressure, rest, successful exposure.
conditions.description: The operative instinctively withdraws from direct confrontation.

conditions.name: Cryosickness
conditions.effectSummary: Nausea, vertigo, and weakness after transit or cold shock.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens dizziness and physical sluggishness.
conditions.treatment: Warmth, hydration, anti-nausea meds, monitored recovery.
conditions.description: The operative is reeling from cryo exposure or violent decompression effects.

conditions.name: Exhausted
conditions.effectSummary: Fatigue drags down physical output and reaction time.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level compounds strain across physical actions.
conditions.treatment: Sleep, food, water, stimulants, light duty, rest cycle.
conditions.description: The operative is running on fumes and cannot sustain peak performance.

conditions.name: Extreme Cold
conditions.effectSummary: Cold stress slows limbs, reactions, and endurance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level deepens numbness and loss of motor control.
conditions.treatment: Insulation, heat source, dry clothing, rewarm gradually.
conditions.description: The operative is suffering from freezing temperatures or cold exposure.

conditions.name: Extreme Heat
conditions.effectSummary: Heat stress blurs judgement and punishes sustained activity.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens dehydration, confusion, and fatigue.
conditions.treatment: Cool zone, fluids, shade, suit regulation, reduced exertion.
conditions.description: The operative is overheating in hostile temperature conditions.

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.effectSummary: Fear control slips and aggression becomes unreliable.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level further erodes nerve and tactical resolve.
conditions.treatment: Reassurance, sedation, command stabilisation, distance from trigger.
conditions.description: The operative is actively rattled by a threat and struggling to stay steady.

conditions.name: Hallucinations
conditions.effectSummary: Perception and judgement become unreliable.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens sensory confusion and bad calls.
conditions.treatment: Sedation, medical intervention, rest, remove toxins or trigger.
conditions.description: The operative cannot fully trust what they see, hear, or infer.

conditions.name: Haunted
conditions.effectSummary: Recurring dread bleeds into calm judgement and fear resistance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level intensifies intrusive thoughts and fear bleed-through.
conditions.treatment: Therapy, ritual closure, proper sleep, medication, protected downtime.
conditions.description: The operative is stalked by memories, echoes, or lingering terror.

conditions.name: Hypervigilance
conditions.effectSummary: Sharper scanning comes at the cost of social ease and calm.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level sharpens detection but worsens social tension.
conditions.treatment: Rest, reassurance, proper sleep, rotation off watch, medication.
conditions.description: The operative is keyed-up and sees every shadow as a threat.

conditions.name: Irradiated
conditions.effectSummary: Radiation poisoning attacks stamina and resilience.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens sickness, weakness, and bodily failure.
conditions.treatment: Rad purge, chems, shielding, detox, medical monitoring.
conditions.description: The operative has absorbed enough radiation to begin deteriorating.

conditions.name: Loss of Confidence
conditions.effectSummary: The operative second-guesses themselves at the worst moment.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level deepens hesitation and poor authority projection.
conditions.treatment: Reassurance, training, recovery, command support, success under pressure.
conditions.description: Self-belief is eroding and assertive action is harder to sustain.

conditions.name: Nightmares
conditions.effectSummary: Poor sleep leaves the operative drained and frayed.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level further erodes recovery and fear resistance.
conditions.treatment: Sleep, sedation, therapy, safer quarters, monitored rest.
conditions.description: Rest is disturbed by vivid recurring trauma or dread imagery.

conditions.name: Panicky
conditions.effectSummary: Fear spikes fast and action discipline suffers.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level makes panic responses harder to contain.
conditions.treatment: Breathing control, sedation, command support, remove from trigger.
conditions.description: The operative is already teetering on the edge of a panic response.

conditions.name: Phobia
conditions.effectSummary: A specific trigger collapses nerve and movement control.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level intensifies the triggered fear spiral.
conditions.treatment: Therapy, controlled exposure, sedation, distance from trigger.
conditions.description: The operative carries a specific overwhelming fear response.

conditions.name: Severe Anxiety
conditions.effectSummary: Every decision comes under pressure and dread.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level further erodes concentration and control.
conditions.treatment: Sedation, therapy, reassurance, reduced exposure to pressure.
conditions.description: The operative is locked in a persistent high-anxiety state.

conditions.name: Social Anxiety
conditions.effectSummary: Communication under pressure becomes difficult and strained.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens hesitation and social friction.
conditions.treatment: Therapy, coaching, medication, low-pressure recovery time.
conditions.description: The operative struggles to perform in direct social or command exchanges.

conditions.name: Starving
conditions.effectSummary: Lack of food and water drains bodily reserves and performance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens weakness, collapse risk, and poor endurance.
conditions.treatment: Food, water, electrolytes, rest, monitored recovery.
conditions.description: The operative is underfed, dehydrated, or metabolically depleted.

conditions.name: Suffocating
conditions.effectSummary: Oxygen loss or choking destroys mental and physical performance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level rapidly worsens every roll tied to survival.
conditions.treatment: Restore air, clear airway, re-pressurise, oxygen mask, evac.
conditions.description: The operative is being starved of oxygen or cannot breathe properly.

conditions.name: The Bends
conditions.effectSummary: Pressure trauma punishes movement, stability, and endurance.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens pain, weakness, and collapse risk.
conditions.treatment: Recompression, oxygen, medical supervision, controlled rest.
conditions.description: The operative is suffering from decompression sickness.

conditions.name: The Shakes
conditions.effectSummary: Fine motor control is unreliable, especially under pressure.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level worsens aim and precision work.
conditions.treatment: Medication, rest, stabilisers, warmth, treat underlying cause.
conditions.description: The operative cannot keep their hands steady enough for precise work.

conditions.name: Toxic Atmosphere
conditions.effectSummary: Toxins attack endurance, balance, and breathing efficiency.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level compounds sickness and bodily failure.
conditions.treatment: Respirator, evac, anti-toxin, purge, sealed environment.
conditions.description: The operative is exposed to a poisonous or unbreathable environment.

conditions.name: Twitchy
conditions.effectSummary: Jumpy reflexes ruin patience, stealth, and delicate control.
conditions.severityScale: Each untreated level makes quiet or precise work harder.
conditions.treatment: Rest, calming meds, decompression, squad reassurance.
conditions.description: The operative keeps flinching, jerking, and overreacting to stimuli.
